rationale: Diff under review contains only execution-evidence manifest/result JSON files. No TD-NNN doc changes and no benchmark file are present in the changed-files list, so none of the acceptance criteria can be verified.

findings.summary: No TD-NNN search-semantics section visible in diff (field precedence, size cap, binary skip, ordering, upgrade threshold).
No benchmark file (e.g. resolver_artifacts_bench_test.go) present in diff against 500-artifact fixture.
Cannot confirm documented p95 budget matches measured baseline; no TD or bench output in diff.
Only execution evidence manifest/result.json files appear in changed-files; the actual implementation commit (bc117725) referenced in result.json is not represented in the reviewable diff.
